HOLD BABYNEIRO AND ELIGIBLE TO CLAIM REVENUE SHARE

BABYNEIRO iS a community driven Tribute token to $NEIRO

BabyNeiro and neiro are looking to fill the shoes of doge and babydoge from the 2021 market cycle

Create a wallet by downloading Metamask onto your mobile device or use the Metamask extension on Chrome 

Transfer Eth from any centralized exchange of your choice into your wallet (ex. Binance or Kucoin)

Use a Swap platform like Uniswap and paste the contract address into the swap window. Proceed to swap Eth for $BabyNeiro

Watch your $BabyNeiro holdings grow as we fill BabyDoge’s shoes rising to the top this cycle
